item.title: Re: I was unsure at first, but then it got fun.
item.content:encoded:
Thank you! I fixed the "your's" and it looks like others fixed the spacing.

Thank you for the kind words! :]

item.title: I was unsure at first, but then it got fun.
item.content:encoded:
A couple of notes:

Dr. Lark:Begin log: D-3MQ1

Needs a space.

Also, "your's" isn't ever a correct word. It's always "yours."

It all got pretty strange at the end, but I rather like strange. Well done.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Whoops! Sorry about that. It is fixed now. :] Thanks for the heads up!

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Not having this page in full-screen essentially make the footnotes unreadable. The little red rectangle at the bottom is what they look like, and they go almost completely under the sidebar. Without a visible footnote block, this means that you have to look at it in fullscreen, or else open the page source. Tried it on two different computers.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Many thanks to Tufto, CadaverCommander, and UraniumEmpire for their input! (And anyone else I might be missing! I'm sure I forgot someone.)

Each of you gave excellent feedback that all contradicted with each other, so this was a fun one to try and edit together :p

Image Sources:

First Image: https://pxhere.com/en/photo/1328568 // License: Public Domain
Second Image: All created by me, Woedenaz!

+ Click here for a brief explaination if confused
- Hide explaination

Just to make this short, the elevator is a "future Buddha" that is foretold to bring great change and mass enlightenment. It has the ability to "create" reality just by saying so. Whatever it says is "True" and has always been "True."

Dr. Lark was originally a D-Class and 4801 made him a researcher just by saying so.

3M was a researcher that 4801 found unworthy and turned him into a D-Class.

And the MTF was all a collection of four D-Classes being experimented on that 4801-β turned into a MTF. Though one of the original D-Class was "sacrified" for this.

There's a number of other things in there too but I said I'd keep this brief so I hope this helps anyone who is confused!

Oh, this is also essentially a part of Sky Sermon so you should totally go read those if you like this!
